compiled_state.title: Add integration tests: merge algorithm and ID-linkage validation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Extend tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh with failing tests for the merge algorithm (added/removed/modified components) and ID-linkage validation. Tests MUST FAIL (RED) until figma-merge.sh and figma-id-validate.sh are implemented.

## testing_mode: RED
Adding new failing test functions to existing test file.

## Test Scenarios (Given/When/Then)

### Merge Algorithm (FP-MERGE-1 through FP-MERGE-4)
- FP-MERGE-1: Given an original manifest and a Figma-derived spatial-layout.json with a new component, when figma-merge.sh runs, then the new component appears with tag:NEW, designer_added:true, behavioral_spec_status:INCOMPLETE in the output
- FP-MERGE-2: Given an original manifest with a COMPLETE-spec component and a Figma spatial-layout.json missing that component, when figma-merge.sh runs, then the component is removed from the output AND stderr contains a warning about the COMPLETE behavioral spec being deleted
- FP-MERGE-3: Given a component with updated absoluteBoundingBox in the new Figma data, when figma-merge.sh runs, then the output spatial_hint reflects the new dimensions while the behavioral spec sections (Interaction Behaviors, Responsive Rules, Accessibility Specification, State Definitions) are unchanged
- FP-MERGE-4: Given an updated TEXT node, when figma-merge.sh runs, then the text content is updated while behavioral specs preserved

### ID-Linkage Validation (FP-LINK-1 through FP-LINK-2)
- FP-LINK-1: Given a 3-artifact manifest where all IDs in spatial-layout.json exist in wireframe.svg and tokens.md, when figma-id-validate.sh runs, then exits 0
- FP-LINK-2: Given a 3-artifact manifest with an orphaned ID (present in spatial-layout.json, absent from wireframe.svg), when figma-id-validate.sh runs, then exits 1 with the orphaned ID listed on stderr

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File contains FP-MERGE-1 through FP-MERGE-4 and FP-LINK-1 through FP-LINK-2
  Verify: for label in FP-MERGE-1 FP-MERGE-2 FP-MERGE-3 FP-MERGE-4 FP-LINK-1 FP-LINK-2; do grep -q "$label" tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh || exit 1; done; echo OK
- [ ] Tests create temp manifest fixtures inline (original + new spatial-layout) to drive merge tests
  Verify: grep -q 'mktemp\|TMPDIR\|tmp_dir' tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh
- [ ] Running test file exits non-zero (RED state maintained)
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

comments.body:
AC amendment: Merge tests require a second fixture representing the designer revision. Create tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-file-response-v2.json with at least one added node, one removed node (from v1), and one modified node (different absoluteBoundingBox). Document which node ID is added/removed/modified.

AC amendment: ID-linkage tests require coordinated fixture files. Create tests/integration/fixtures/figma/spatial-layout-sample.json, wireframe-sample.svg, and tokens-sample.md with matching IDs for the positive test (FP-LINK-1) and a deliberately orphaned ID for the negative test (FP-LINK-2).
comments.author: Test
